cooperates.cooperate_desc: You can avoid granger's shots by using spell 2.  If you use Flacker and attack granger closely, brody can have an advantage.  So, if the enemy chooses to hold granger, choose and use Brody as a priority.

counters.counter_desc: You can avoid Irithel's shots by using spell 2.  If you use Flacker and attack Irithel closely, brody can have an advantage.  So, if the enemy chooses to hold Irithel, choose and use Brody as a priority.

dominants.dominant_desc: As for Brody, I would suggest to stay close to the tower and save play in the early part.  When you have 2 items or one enmay mm, be sure to use spell 1 spell 2 for a 1 vs 1 fight and you can defeat uti and enamy.
dominants.dominant_title: Brody is mid and late game hero.

emblems.emblem_desc: (Swift) was chosen to trust Brody when he was low on blood.  (Master assassin. ) The reason for choosing this is to deal more damage both in the early game and in the late game when there is only one team member on the enemy side.  (Lethal lgnition) is chosen because it can deal damage from 162 to 750 on the enemy hero.

equips.equip_desc: This equipment is a build that can counter physical damage and deal more damage to the enemy from a distance.
This equipment is a build that can counter magic damage and deal more damage to the enemy from a distance.

hero.hero_overview: Brody is very strong damage hero for Gold lane.
hero.hero_strength:
Early save farm.
Mid team fight battle.
Late game team fight battle.
hero.hero_weakness: For those who are just starting to use Brody, you can make good use of his spell 1 and spell 2 to win over the enemy or to run away when your blood is low.  As for his uti, you can use uti to kill enemies when they are low on blood.  Brody doesn't deal much damage in the early part, so it is most important to play save in the early part and farm to get more gold.  If you reach the mid game, you already have 2 items for Brody, so it's convenient to attack in team fight battles.  At that time, his damage is such that he can easily kill the enemy's MM and Mages.  If you reach the late game, if you stay behind with tanks and fighters, save play so that the enemy doesn't attack you, and enter the battle, the final victory will be welcome for you.   If you are going to hold brody hero, far away lesley.   I would like to recommend banning Layla.   This is because Lesley and Layla are good heroes with good cover and good damage.

hero.hero_overview: Brody is one of the "safer" MM choices, especially in professional play due to his mobility, CC and high damage. He works really well against Popol and Kupa, because his S1 can pass through minions and Kupa to deal damage onto Popol himself.
hero.hero_strength: Brody is known for his high damage output, mobility, and powerful crowd control.
hero.hero_weakness: Brody may have difficulty fighting other marksmen one-on-one, especially in the late game. Heroes who can chase Brody, such as assassins and fighters, can be a weakness.
